title: Floor Squeegee with Long Handle(50IN), Extendable Foam Squeegee Mop for Wet Room, Squidgy Shower Cleaner, Handled Floors Sweeper Water Wiper for Bathroom Kitchen Pool Pet Hair
features: EVA Foam Squeegee Blade: It adopts high quality foam blade(13.4IN), lightweight and soft, not absorbing water and not scratching the floor.
Adjustable Long Handle: Comes with 4-section stainless steel poles, length 50'', long enough to clean floors.
180° Adjustable Kunckle Joint: 180° rotation design for the squeegee head, perfect for cleaning corners and edges, places hard to reach.
Multipurpose and Quick Drying: To easily remove water, dirty, pet hair, and quickly dry the floor, suitable for wet floor, bathroom, kitchen, shower.
Easy to Use: Just need less efforts to dry floors and surfaces. No more bothered by floor cleaning and easily to get the job done.
description: Product Description Easier Cleaning and Perfect for Home EVA FOAM FLOOR SQUEEGEE With this foam squeegee, you can say “Goodbye” to the mop and towel , and you will also get “Goodbuy” from your family. Just apply light pressure to free yourself from extra drying. High Flexible Foam Blade With high flexibility, it can ensure removing water, pet hair, oil and other dirt easily and thoroughly. 180° Adjustable Knuckle Joint Taking this 180° pivoting design on the head, it can help clean places hard to reach, such as dirt below sofa, water below toilet table, etc. Easy to Clean with Water After using, it could be cleaned by water only, no longer to be annoyed by extra cleaning trifles. Easy to Store Fitted with a hole on the telescop handle, it can be hung on the wall and saves room for your home.
